task: I need to send a short email to a service provider about a billing issue that doesn’t match what I expected. Can you help me word it so I ask for the details and next steps clearly?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, polite email you can send:

**Subject:** Question About Billing

Hi [Name/Team],

I noticed a billing charge that doesn’t match what I was expecting. Could you please review it and send me the details behind the charge, along with the next steps to resolve it?

Thank you for your help.

Best,  
[Your Name]

If you want, I can also make it sound more firm or more casual.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clear. I’d probably use that as-is, maybe just change “doesn’t match what I was expecting” to “appears to be incorrect” if I want it a little firmer. Otherwise it’s fine.
